help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: We keep the most common answers here so users can troubleshoot quickly.
help.faqMessageQuestion: What should I do if messages are not arriving?
help.faqMessageAnswer: First check your network and message service connection status, then confirm the other user is already your friend. If it still fails, return to the messages page and wait for auto reconnect so recent messages can be pulled again.
help.faqCallQuestion: Why can't a voice call be established?
help.faqCallAnswer: The web app needs browser microphone permission, and LiveKit also needs to be configured. If you only see a preview page, check whether voice service integration is fully configured in the current environment.
help.faqCopyQuestion: Where can I change copy-trading settings?
help.faqCopyAnswer: Open copy-trading settings from the trader profile sidebar or the private chat profile panel, then adjust ratio, max position, and other limits there.
help.faqGroupQuestion: What group management features are available?
help.faqGroupAnswer: Owners and admins can edit group info, add members, and remove members. Owners can also assign admins and dissolve the group.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This is the in-app readable version for now. It can later be replaced with a legal-reviewed formal policy.
privacy.section1Body: This includes account profile data, the minimum message-related data needed for delivery, trader profile data, copy-trading configuration, and login or device records generated for security.
privacy.section2Body: It is mainly used for identity verification, message delivery, trader display, copy-trading features, risk control checks, and experience improvements. Private chat content is not exposed just for product analytics.
privacy.section3Body: Public profiles only show information the user intentionally makes public. Private chats, groups, and copy-trading settings are used only within the business scope that requires them, and sensitive data is not shown publicly.
privacy.section4Body: Message and trading-related data is retained based on business needs. The system aims to reduce misuse risk through authentication, permission layers, connection checks, and operation logs.
